title: Full God-schema reshape: core + embed + 4 operation-specific changesets
prompt: Reshape test_fixtures/god_schema_user.ex into a production-quality MyApp.Accounts.User. Requirements: (1) extract profile fields (bio, avatar_url, phone) into embedded MyApp.Accounts.Profile with its own changeset; (2) keep core fields (email, name, password_hash, is_admin, role, subscription_tier, credit_balance) on User; (3) embeds_one :profile with on_replace: :update; (4) FOUR separate changesets on User: registration_changeset/2 (email, name, password_hash), profile_changeset/2 (name + cast_embed profile), admin_changeset/2 (is_admin, role, subscription_tier), credit_balance_changeset/2 (credit_balance); (5) UTC timestamps; (6) validate credit_balance >= 0; (7) Decimal type preserved; (8) unique_constraint email; (9) validate_format email. Write to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex.
tier_rationale: Maximum-complexity refactor requiring all four capability skills in concert: schema decomposition, embedding, changeset splitting, and field-type discipline. Legendary because any single gap breaks the whole.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes plugin + Phoenix security guide + oliver-kriska Iron Laws.
